name: Alex Rivera
title: Software Engineer - ML / AI / GenAI
summary: AI/ML engineer with 3+ years building and deploying NLP and LLM-powered systems in a regulated enterprise setting. Built an independent agentic GenAI platform spanning multiple database engines.

bullets: Tuned LinearSVC hyperparameters via GridSearchCV, improving text classification performance across retention categories.
Designed a prompt-driven LLM approach using contextual class descriptions to assess unigrams/bigrams and refine TF-IDF feature selection.
Applied SHAP for feature attribution, giving business and audit stakeholders auditable model explanations for governance and compliance.
Built a monitoring proof-of-concept combining computer vision and LLMs to flag suspicious activity, extending the team into applied computer vision.
Maintained zero escaped defects to UAT/Prod and zero critical/high static-analysis issues; monitored 60+ scheduled jobs daily.
Independently ran a production Python version upgrade with zero-downtime deployment, coordinating with DevOps.
Submitted 3 solutions in an internal prompt-a-thon and delivered a working global-hackathon solution.
Prototyped an AI-powered database retention platform using a frontier LLM and SQLAlchemy across 6 database platforms, achieving 90% SQL query accuracy.

Built a scalable async pipeline with FastAPI endpoints and a Streamlit UI enabling parallel batch execution through a multi-step LLM workflow (classification, retention analysis, priority scoring, SQL generation) with audit logging.
Reduced LLM token usage by 69% via intelligent batching and cache optimization; designed a database-agnostic architecture with dialect-specific SQL generation.
Revived and ported a legacy analysis tool to the latest Python and Django versions through targeted refactoring and version-compatibility fixes.
Automated CLI test cases for network switches in Python, extending coverage in an internal automation framework.
